zh.Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾斯托普特
zh.Haddenham, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾哈登哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Hyde於1522年出生在英國爾諾波利時，他的父親Hamnet Hyde31歲，母親Margaret Isabel Warren30歲。他於1541年與Jane Davenport在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1571年1月27日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Hyde于1522年出生在英国爾諾波利时，他的父亲Hamnet Hyde31岁，母亲Margaret Isabel Warren30岁。他于1541年与Jane Davenport在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1571年1月27日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Hyde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of various places so called in Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Hampshire, and Middlesex. They were named with Old English hīd ‘hide (of land)’, a variable measure of land, differing from place to place and time to time, and seems to have been originally fixed as the amount necessary to support one (extended) family (Old English hīgan, hīwan ‘household’). The surname may also be topographic for someone living on (and farming) a hide of land. The Hyde family has been in Leinster, Ireland, since the early 13th century and one family has been established in the county of Cork since the 16th century. The name was Gaelicized as both Dalaithíd and de hÍde. Compare Hyder .

variants.name: Dollarhide
meanings: Irish: possibly an altered form of de la Hyde (see Hyde ), which was a prominent surname in Leinster from medieval times onward. Compare Dollahite .

History: Francis Dollahide, born c. 1650–60 in County Dublin, Ireland, was the ancestor of Americans with the surname Dollahide, Dollahite, and Dollarhide. In 1680 he was transported to MD for some youthful misdemeanor. He appears to have been an educated man and rose to be an important landowner and politician, serving in the Lower House of the MD legislature as an elected representative for Baltimore County from c. 1705 to 1721.

variants.name: Hyder
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): status name or topographic name for one who lived on or possessed a hide of land, from Middle English hide + the locative suffix -er. This is a characteristically southeastern English name, synonymous with Middle English atte hide elsewhere (see Hyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Hyde was born in 1522, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, his father, Hamnet Hyde, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Isabel Warren, was 30. He married Jane Davenport in 1541, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 27 January 1571, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Hyde est né en 1522, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamnet Hyde, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Isabel Warren, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Jane Davenport en 1541, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Hyde 1522 in Norbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamnet Hyde 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Isabel Warren 30. Er hat 1541 in England Jane Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Januar 1571 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hyde è nato il nel 1522 nel Norbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hamnet Hyde, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Isabel Warren, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Jane Davenport nel 1541, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 27 gennaio 1571, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hydeが1522年にイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで生まれた時，父Hamnet Hydeは31歳，母Margaret Isabel Warrenは30歳であった。1541年にイギリスでJane Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1571年1月27日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Hyde(이)가 1522년 영국 체실르 노르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamnet Hyde(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Isabel Warren(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1541년 영국에서 Jane Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 1월 27일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Hyde nasceu em 1522, em Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamnet Hyde, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Isabel Warren, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Davenport em 1541, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1571, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Hyde родился в 1522 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hamnet Hyde было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Isabel Warren, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Davenport в 1541 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 27 января 1571 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Hyde nació en 1522, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamnet Hyde, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Isabel Warren, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Jane Davenport en 1541, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 27 de enero de 1571, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
